content.title: The High Prospect of Laylatul Qadr
content.subtitle: Invest in Quran & Dua Features
content.body:
Tonight is the magnificent night of the 27th of Ramadan. On this night, which holds the immense potential of being better than a thousand months, strive for the mercy and forgiveness of Allah.

Special Dua for Laylatul Qadr

The Messenger of Allah (SAW) taught us to recite this Dua abundantly tonight:

اللَّهُمَّ إِنَّكَ عَفُوٌّ تُحِبُّ الْعَفُوَّ فَاعْفُ عَنِّي

O Allah, You are Most Forgiving, You love to forgive, so forgive me.

Deeds to Perform Tonight

  • Tarawih: Complete your 20 Rakats of Tarawih.

  • Nafil Salat: Perform Nafal Salat for as long as possible.

  • Repentance: Seek forgiveness from Allah with sincere tears.

  • Durood Sharif: Recite Durud upon the Prophet (SAW) to increase the chances of your Dua being accepted.

  • Sadaqah: Give charity according to your means.

Support Our Mission

We have initiated the development of the 'Tajweed Color Code' for the Quran and 'Dua Audio' features within the Muslims Day app. Contribute on this sacred night towards the research and development of these features. As users learn and recite from these features, you will InshaAllah share in the rewards of every single recitation. Let your contribution become a Sadaqah Jariyah (ongoing charity).

footer_button.hint: Maintaining a dedicated team of 12-15 members for Muslims Day involves significant monthly operational costs
footer_button.text: Contribute on the Likely Night of Qadr
